title: Beauty & Wellness Consultant (Sales)
description:
Job Title

Beauty & Wellness Consultant (Sales)

Location: Singapore
Brand: VII SKINN – Meridian Science • Visible Confidence

About VII SKINN

VII SKINN is a premium beauty & wellness studio integrating TCM Meridian Therapy with advanced cell-regeneration technologies such as Proionic (448kHz), LED, lymphatic and holistic face-body programmes.
We are known for our no-hard-sell philosophy, personalised consultations, and long-term client relationships built on trust and results.

Role Overview

As a Beauty & Wellness Consultant, you are the bridge between client needs and customised treatment solutions.
This role focuses on ethical sales, education, and relationship building, not pressure selling.

You will conduct in-depth consultations, recommend suitable programmes, and support clients throughout their wellness journey.

Key Responsibilities

Client Consultation & Sales

  • Conduct professional skin & body consultations (training provided)

  • Understand client concerns, lifestyle, and wellness goals

  • Recommend personalised treatment programmes aligned with client needs

  • Close sales ethically through education, not pressure

  • Handle enquiries, follow-ups, and re-booking

Customer Relationship Management

  • Build long-term client trust and retention

  • Maintain accurate client records and treatment plans

  • Proactively follow up on client progress and satisfaction

  • Support membership and package renewals

Brand & Service Standards

  • Uphold VII SKINN’s premium service and no-hard-sell culture

  • Work closely with therapists to ensure treatment consistency

  • Maintain a clean, welcoming, and professional environment

  • Support outlet targets and team KPIs

Requirements

Experience & Skills

  • Minimum 1–2 years in beauty, aesthetics, wellness, or service-based sales

  • Strong communication and interpersonal skills

  • Sales-driven but client-centric and ethical

  • Comfortable with consultation-based selling

  • Basic understanding of skincare, body treatments, or wellness concepts is a plus

Personality Fit

  • Warm, confident, and well-presented

  • Passionate about beauty, wellness, and self-care

  • Responsible, disciplined, and team-oriented

  • Open to learning holistic and TCM-inspired concepts

What We Offer

  • Attractive basic + commission structure

  • Performance bonuses & incentives

  • Professional training in:

    • Meridian Therapy concepts

    • Advanced beauty & wellness technologies

  • Clear career progression (Senior Consultant / Manager track)

  • Supportive, respectful, no-toxic-sales culture

  • Staff treatments & wellness benefits

Working Hours

  • 5–6 days work week (rostered)

  • Includes weekends & evenings

How to Apply

Please email your resume to myviiskinn@gmail.com with the subject:
“Beauty & Wellness Consultant – VII SKINN”
